title: EPF Paradox Summary v0
description: Schema for the current epf_paradox_summary.json artifact emitted by the EPF experiment shadow workflow.

deps_rc.description: Dependency-install step return code as recorded by the current workflow.

runall_rc.description: run_all.py step return code as recorded by the current workflow.

baseline_rc.description: Baseline check_gates step return code as recorded by the current workflow.

epf_rc.description: EPF shadow check_gates step return code as recorded by the current workflow.

total_gates.description: Number of baseline gates considered in the comparison.

changed.description: Number of baseline->EPF gate decision differences recorded.

examples.description: Sample changed gates emitted by the current workflow.
